titles.en: Chapter on One Who Dies While Owing the Hajj of Islam and a Vowed Hajj
Chapter on One Who Dies While Owing the Hajj of Islam and a Vowed Hajj

segments: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَلَيْهِ حَجَّةُ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ نَذَرَ نَذْراً فِي شُكْرٍ لَيُحِجَّنَّ بِهِ رَجُلاً إِلَى مَكَّةَ فَمَاتَ اَلَّذِي نَذَرَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَحُجَّ حَجَّةَ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ وَ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ يَفِيَ بِنَذْرِهِ اَلَّذِي نَذَرَ قَالَ «إِنْ كَانَ تَرَكَ مَالاً يُحَجُّ عَنْهُ حَجَّةُ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ مِنْ جَمِيعِ اَلْمَالِ وَ أُخْرِجَ مِنْ ثُلُثِهِ مَا يَحُجُّ بِهِ رَجُلٌ لِنَذْرِهِ وَ قَدْ وَفَى بِالنَّذْرِ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ تَرَكَ مَالاً إِلاَّ بِقَدْرِ مَا يُحَجُّ بِهِ حَجَّةُ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ حُجَّ عَنْهُ بِمَا تَرَكَ وَ يَحُجُّ عَنْهُ وَلِيُّهُ حَجَّةَ اَلنَّذْرِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ مِثْلُ دَيْنٍ عَلَيْهِ ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَلَيْهِ حَجَّةُ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ نَذَرَ نَذْراً فِي شُكْرٍ لَيُحِجَّنَّ بِهِ رَجُلاً إِلَى مَكَّةَ فَمَاتَ اَلَّذِي نَذَرَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَحُجَّ حَجَّةَ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ وَ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ يَفِيَ بِنَذْرِهِ اَلَّذِي نَذَرَ قَالَ «إِنْ كَانَ تَرَكَ مَالاً يُحَجُّ عَنْهُ حَجَّةُ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ مِنْ جَمِيعِ اَلْمَالِ وَ أُخْرِجَ مِنْ ثُلُثِهِ مَا يَحُجُّ بِهِ رَجُلٌ لِنَذْرِهِ وَ قَدْ وَفَى بِالنَّذْرِ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ تَرَكَ مَالاً إِلاَّ بِقَدْرِ مَا يُحَجُّ بِهِ حَجَّةُ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ حُجَّ عَنْهُ بِمَا تَرَكَ وَ يَحُجُّ عَنْهُ وَلِيُّهُ حَجَّةَ اَلنَّذْرِ إِنَّمَا هُوَ مِثْلُ دَيْنٍ عَلَيْهِ ».

segments:
Hadith.2882 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Durays al-Kunasi, who said:
I asked Abu Ja'far (as) about a man who was obligated to perform the Hajj of Islam but made a vow of gratitude to send another man to perform Hajj to Mecca on his behalf. The man died before performing the Hajj of Islam and before fulfilling the vow he had made.
Imam (as) said: "If he left wealth, the Hajj of Islam should be performed on his behalf from his entire estate, and from one-third of his estate, funds should be allocated to send a man to fulfill the vow he made. In this way, the vow will have been fulfilled. However, if he left only enough wealth for the Hajj of Islam, it should be used for that purpose, and his heir should perform the Hajj of the vow on his behalf, as the vow is akin to a debt upon him."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2882 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Durays al-Kunasi, who said:
I asked Abu Ja'far (as) about a man who was obligated to perform the Hajj of Islam but made a vow of gratitude to send another man to perform Hajj to Mecca on his behalf. The man died before performing the Hajj of Islam and before fulfilling the vow he had made.
Imam (as) said: "If he left wealth, the Hajj of Islam should be performed on his behalf from his entire estate, and from one-third of his estate, funds should be allocated to send a man to fulfill the vow he made. In this way, the vow will have been fulfilled. However, if he left only enough wealth for the Hajj of Islam, it should be used for that purpose, and his heir should perform the Hajj of the vow on his behalf, as the vow is akin to a debt upon him."

narratorChain.raw: 2882 - رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ ضُرَيْسٍ اَلْكُنَاسِيِّ قَالَ
